parityMeta.describes: iOS-17e-3 progressionRulesEngine parity — backoff (technique streak). A compound templateExercise (repMin 6 / repMax 8 / sets 3 / startWeight 60 / regressionIds + replacementSuggested) whose two most recent sessions log POOR technique drives shouldBackoff via techniqueSuggestsBackoff (streak>=2): nextWeight = lastWeight - increment = 57.5, reps = repMin, note '最近两次动作质量都偏差' + the regression hint + the replacement hint. lastSummary carries '/ 技术较差'. shouldUseTopBackoff true; buildSetPrescription emits the top+backoff prescription. FUNCTION-LEVEL compute-assert on the Swift side.
parityMeta.sourceNotes: deterministicClockIso anchored in the PAST => live fineTune window empty (golden-neutral). Sessions NEWEST-FIRST: two newest sessions all-poor technique => poorTechniqueStreak=2 => techniqueSuggestsBackoff.
